overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking through a rugged mountain valley. The character travels alongside a shallow stream before turning to ascend a grassy hillside, with rocky cliffs, scattered trees, and distant mountains visible throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the edge of a mountain stream with a rifle slung across the back

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain cliff face rising steeply from the stream
shallow flowing water with visible rocks and gentle current
golden-brown grassy slope with scattered wildflowers and shrubs
solitary evergreen tree standing on the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path beside a shallow mountain stream, with a steep rocky cliff on the left and open grassy meadows rising to the right. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight, highlighting the warm golden tones of the dry grass and the clear flowing water.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountainside trail with telegraph lines

events.description: character turns right away from the stream and begins ascending the grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill through dry grass and rocks, moving away from the stream valley toward higher ground

entered.detail: large boulders and rock formations scattered across the hillside
wooden utility pole with crossbars indicating a trail route
wires stretching between poles against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the streamside path and ascends a grassy hillside dotted with rocks. Wooden telegraph poles with power lines become visible on the right, indicating a maintained trail through the wilderness. The stream recedes into the distance as the terrain becomes rockier and the elevation increases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-lying riverside path to an ascending rocky hillside. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail beside a shallow mountain stream, flanked by a steep rocky cliff and sun-drenched meadows. As the character leaves the water's edge, the camera follows the ascent up a grassy slope where the stream gradually recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes increasingly rocky and elevation rises, bringing wooden telegraph poles and power lines into view along the right side of the trail. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a rugged wilderness landscape under the bright midday sun.
